steps.t: Dâr-gazag, built on the ruins of a Rhudauran citadel, lay far to the west of Ost Ringdyr, across the Hoardale River. Make your way to the fortress and…
Sergeant-at-Arms Thurimbent awaits your return at Glân Vraig. Facing down the Enemy, you destroyed the War-master at Dâr-gazag. You should return to S…
